title: Teaching
body: ![](http://www.xarop.com/wp-content/uploads/2010/11/invattur-home2-244x300.png "invattur.org") **Another [project](http://www.xarop.com/category/works/) for [Socialtec](http://www.xarop.com/tag/socialtec/): the design of the [Invat·tur Community](http://www.invattur.org/).** My work on this project involved designing the various screens that make up the site. I also adapted the corporate identity for both the website and each of the social media platforms where this community is active. Invat.tur is the Valencian Institute of Tourism Technologies, a center conceived as a meeting platform for all stakeholders in the tourism sector and which represents one of the main pillars in improving the competitiveness and sustainability of the tourism model in the Valencian Community, through the development of R&D&I projects and adaptation to new trends in the tourism market across all its facets. The facilities housing Invat.tur were constructed with co-financing from the European Union’s ERDF funds.
